notable_findings: All current repo-side 2026 HAMSS and September archery elk rows match the truth table.
HAMSS totals remained flat at 80 to 80.
September archery totals increased from 70 to 72 (+2).
Cache, North decreased from 28 to 24 (-4) in both HAMSS and September archery.
Southwest Desert, North increased from 18 to 23 (+5) in both HAMSS and September archery.
East Canyon HAMSS decreased from 10 to 8 (-2).
